places.name: Barsana — Radha's Home
places.modernInfo: Radha's birthplace. Famous for Lathmar Holi — women beat men with sticks. Radharani temple on the hill.

scenes.title: Radha's divine birth
scenes.description: Radha was not born from a womb but appeared as a divine light in a lotus flower in Barsana. She is the Shakti of Vishnu — the supreme feminine principle.

scenes.title: Lathmar Holi
scenes.description: When Krishna came to Barsana to tease Radha and her friends, the women chased him with lathis (sticks). This divine playfulness is reenacted every year as Lathmar Holi.

places.name: Ayodhya
places.modernInfo: The Padma Purana describes Ayodhya as one of the 7 most sacred cities (Sapta Puri) that grant liberation.

scenes.title: The seven liberation cities
scenes.description: The Padma Purana names Ayodhya first among the 7 Sapta Puri — cities that grant moksha to all who die there: Ayodhya, Mathura, Haridwar, Kashi, Kanchi, Ujjain, Dwarka.
